case_title: JAVAID, NASIR VS ROSE, MILDRED P et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAVAID, NASIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ROSE, MILDRED P RENEAU, EILEEN RENEAU, EILEEN DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
